name: Memory Aegis v10
description: Constitutional Governance Memory Engine for AI agents. Features 5-tier policy pipeline (C0-C4), Truth Registry, Zero-Locking Identity, and Residual Judgment scoring.

preset.description: Memory profile: 'minimal' (lightweight), 'balanced' (default, recommended), 'local-safe' (privacy-first with archiving), 'full' (all layers enabled).

retrievalMaxHops.description: Maximum graph traversal depth for spreading activation

decayHalfLifeDays.description: Half-life for temporal decay of volatile memories

crystallizationThreshold.description: Minimum spaced recalls before crystallization eligible

maintenanceCron.description: Cron schedule for background maintenance (decay, pruning, promotion)

pythonToolAdapter.description: Route plugin runtime through aegis_py. 'force' is the Python-only path; 'auto' remains transitional only while host packaging cleanup is in progress.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: [Basic] Search long-term memory for context relevant to a query.

tools.name: memory_context_pack
tools.description: [Basic] Build a lexical-first, explainable context pack for an external host model.

tools.name: memory_conflict_prompt
tools.description: [Advanced] List Python-owned conflict prompts that require explicit review or resolution.

tools.name: memory_conflict_resolve
tools.description: [Advanced] Apply an explicit Python-owned resolution action to a conflict prompt.

tools.name: memory_link_store
tools.description: [Advanced] Create or update an explicit relation between two memories in the same scope.

tools.name: memory_link_neighbors
tools.description: [Advanced] Inspect explicit linked neighbors for a memory node.

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: [Advanced] Read a specific memory node by citation path.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: [Basic] Save new information into long-term memory.

tools.name: memory_surface
tools.description: [Basic] Describe the Python-owned public memory contract and ownership boundaries for host integrations.

tools.name: memory_scope_policy
tools.description: [Advanced] Inspect whether a scope is local-only or sync-eligible without requiring any remote backend.

syncPolicy.description: Optional sync policy filter when listing explicit policies.

tools.name: memory_backup_upload
tools.description: [Advanced] Create a Python-owned snapshot or logical export for local backup workflows.

tools.name: memory_sync_export
tools.description: [Advanced] Export a Python-owned sync envelope for a specific scope.

tools.name: memory_sync_preview
tools.description: [Advanced] Preview a Python-owned sync envelope before importing it.

tools.name: memory_sync_import
tools.description: [Advanced] Import a Python-owned sync envelope into local Aegis storage.

tools.name: memory_backup_download
tools.description: [Advanced] Restore the Python-owned local memory database from a snapshot or export file, either fully or for a single scope.

snapshotPath.description: Path to the snapshot or export file.

scopeType.description: Optional scope type for selective scope restore.

scopeId.description: Optional scope ID for selective scope restore.

tools.name: memory_backup_list
tools.description: [Advanced] List known Aegis backups using manifest-backed metadata.

tools.name: memory_backup_preview
tools.description: [Advanced] Validate a backup and preview restore impact without mutating the active database, either fully or for a single scope.

snapshotPath.description: Path to the snapshot or export file to validate.

scopeType.description: Optional scope type for selective scope preview.

scopeId.description: Optional scope ID for selective scope preview.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: [Basic] Return Python-owned status with bounded health state, structured issues, and capability flags.

tools.name: memory_setup
tools.description: [Basic] Run the Python-owned Aegis setup and readiness checks.

tools.name: memory_remember
tools.description: [Basic] Store a piece of information into memory using natural language.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: [Basic] Retrieve memories related to a query using natural language.

tools.name: memory_correct
tools.description: [Basic] Correct or update an existing piece of information in memory.

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.description: [Basic] Remove a specific piece of information from memory.

tools.name: memory_doctor
tools.description: [Advanced] Return a Python-owned diagnostic report with health.state, health.issues, and health.capabilities.

tools.name: memory_governance
tools.description: [Advanced] Inspect governance events and state transitions for the Python-owned runtime.

tools.name: memory_background_plan
tools.description: [Advanced] Plan governed background intelligence proposals for a scope.

tools.name: memory_background_shadow
tools.description: [Advanced] Shadow-run a planned background intelligence proposal.

tools.name: memory_background_apply
tools.description: [Advanced] Apply a governed background run with blast-radius controls.

tools.name: memory_background_rollback
tools.description: [Advanced] Roll back an applied background intelligence run.

tools.name: memory_vector_inspect
tools.description: [Advanced] Inspect local vector-store matches for a scoped query.

tools.name: memory_evidence_artifacts
tools.description: [Advanced] List evidence artifacts recorded by the Python-owned runtime.

tools.name: memory_storage_footprint
tools.description: [Advanced] Inspect SQLite storage footprint and the current compaction policy.

tools.name: memory_storage_compact
tools.description: [Advanced] Prune cold historical rows and reclaim SQLite space with bounded compaction.

archivedMemoryDays.description: Delete archived memories older than this many days.

supersededMemoryDays.description: Delete superseded memories older than this many days.

evidenceDays.description: Delete cold evidence rows older than this many days.

governanceDays.description: Delete cold governance rows older than this many days.

replicationDays.description: Delete replication audit rows older than this many days.

backgroundDays.description: Delete discarded background runs older than this many days.

tools.name: memory_clean
tools.description: [Advanced] Run maintenance: expire TTL nodes, resolve conflicts, archive old data, classify unlabeled memories.

dryRun.description: If true, only report what would be cleaned without making changes. Not yet supported by the Python adapter.

tools.name: memory_rebuild
tools.description: [Advanced] Run a Python-owned rebuild/maintenance pass for derived memory state.

tools.name: memory_scan
tools.description: [Advanced] Run a Python-owned contradiction scan outside the normal maintenance cycle.

tools.name: memory_profile
tools.description: [Basic] Show what Aegis remembers about you: identity, preferences, projects, and recent facts.

tools.name: memory_visualize
tools.description: [Advanced] Return a Python-owned graph snapshot of current memory nodes and contradiction links.

tools.name: memory_taxonomy_clean
tools.description: [Advanced] Run Python-owned taxonomy cleanup and return updated subject distribution.

skills.name: remember
skills.description: Lưu thông tin vào bộ nhớ dài hạn.
skills.prompt: Store the following information into Aegis long-term memory using the memory_store tool. Confirm what was stored.

skills.name: recall
skills.description: Truy vấn bộ nhớ dài hạn.
skills.prompt: Search Aegis memory using the memory_search tool for context relevant to the user's query. Present results clearly with sources and relevance scores.

skills.name: memory-status
skills.description: Xem trạng thái bộ nhớ tổng quan.
skills.prompt: Run memory_stats and memory_doctor. Show a clear summary of Python-owned memory status, health, and open issues.

skills.name: memory-clean
skills.description: Dọn dẹp và bảo trì bộ nhớ.
skills.prompt: Run memory_clean tool to perform maintenance. Report: expired nodes, archived nodes, taxonomy migrations, contradictions found.

skills.name: memory-backup
skills.prompt: Run memory_backup_upload with mode='snapshot', then run memory_backup_preview on the generated path. Report the backup path, file size, and dry-run restore summary.

skills.name: memory-profile
skills.description: Xem Aegis đang nhớ gì về bạn.
skills.prompt: Run memory_profile tool. Show the user what Aegis remembers about them: identity, preferences, projects, workflows, and recent knowledge.

skills.name: memory-setup
skills.prompt: Guide the user through the Python-first setup flow described in the README: install requirements, run the Python MCP self-test, and confirm the local DB path.
